randomTickTable.title: Random Tick Reference Table
randomTickTable.note:
Median values marked ~ are numerical approximations — no closed-form exists for the negative binomial distribution. Exact medians are shown without ~ for single-stage mechanics.
Growth times assume optimal conditions unless noted.
randomTickTable.edit: To edit this page, go to Template:RandomTickTable, where JSON data is stored.
randomTickTable.col.avgTimeForItems: Avg. time for {n} item | Avg. time for {n} items
randomTickTable.col.avgTimeForItemsWithC: Avg. time for {n} item ({crops} crop) | Avg. time for {n} items ({crops} crops)
